title: Recordings
subtitlePrefix: Manage audio recordings for your organization. Use
subtitleMiddle: in prompt fields to insert them, or as transition messages in tool calls.

card.title: All Recordings
card.description: Audio recordings shared across all agents in your organization

list.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this recording?
list.idInvalid: Only letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores
list.updateIdSuccess: Recording ID updated to "{id}". All workflow references have been updated.
list.searchPlaceholder: Search by filename, transcript, or ID...

uploadDialog.title: Upload Recordings
uploadDialog.descriptionPrefix: Upload or record audio files. Use
uploadDialog.descriptionSuffix: in prompt fields to insert them into your agents.
uploadDialog.recordingExceedsLimit: Recording ({size}MB) exceeds the maximum allowed size of 5MB.
uploadDialog.micDenied: Microphone access denied. Please allow microphone permissions.
uploadDialog.pending: Pending ({count, plural, one {# file} other {# files}})
